input: Where is the function that handles user login?
Find all callers of the parseConfig function.
Locate the file where rate limiting is implemented.
Show me where we define the User type.
Find usages of the legacy session API.
Where is the retry logic for failed Stripe webhooks?
How does the OAuth callback in src/auth/callback.ts work?
Walk me through the request lifecycle in our API server.
Explain why we use a Map for the session store instead of a plain object.
What does the retry logic in fetchWithBackoff do?
How is our pagination implemented in the user list endpoint?
Explain the state machine in src/order/state.ts.
The login flow returns 500 when the email contains a plus sign. Fix it.
Tests in user_test.py are failing after the migration — diagnose and patch.
There's a memory leak in the websocket handler. Find and fix.
The retry logic isn't backing off correctly — patch the bug.
Pagination skips the last page when count is an exact multiple of page size. Fix.
Race condition in cache invalidation — find the bug and patch it.
The CI build at https://github.com/foo/bar/actions/runs/1234567 just failed. What broke?
Why is this failing? https://app.circleci.com/pipelines/github/foo/bar/123/workflows/abc
The build is red on PR #42 — investigate.
Look at /tmp/ci-logs/build-456.log and tell me what failed.
Look at the code and fix whatever's wrong with it.
notes: boundary: vague but action-oriented; only fix_bug involves changes

input: Why is this test failing?
notes: boundary: 'why failing' surface but a failing test usually wants a patch — fix_bug over debug_ci

input: Walk me through how the auth flow is implemented.
notes: boundary: 'walk me through' is explainer; surface 'how implemented' could be find_code but the dominant intent is explanation
